attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: Google DeepMind is investing $10 million in research to explore the potential risks of interactions among millions of AI agents operating concurrently.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: The latest advancements in Google AI include the Gemini 3.5 Live Translate feature, which provides near real-time translation, and a new multimodal model, Gemma 4 12B, which is designed without encoders.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: As AI agent adoption is projected to surge by up to 300% within the next two years, organizations are reassessing their leadership strategies to effectively integrate hybrid human-AI workforces.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: At a recent SXSW event, insights were shared on key themes in AI, highlighting the significant impact and evolving dynamics of AI technology.
